MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $466.07 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, CLAUDIA MARISOL DIAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, CLAUDIA MARISOL DIAZ $466.07 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $546.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF OPORTUN, INC. RE; RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED AUG-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, CLAUDIA MARISOL DIAZ
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. MATTER CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2019 AT 8:30 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-04-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST APPEARED AT THE 8:30 HEARING ON ANOTHER MATTER. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THEY WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO APPEAR FOR THE 10:00 A.M. HEARING AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE AT THAT TIME. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA MARISOL DIAZ CASTILLO IS NOT PRESENT AT THE 10 A.M. HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIE SALAS LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA MARISOL DIAZ CASTILLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-26-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
